Class TrackedMemorySegmentLease

java.lang.Object
com.teragrep.buf_01.buffer.lease.TrackedMemorySegmentLease
All Implemented Interfaces:
Lease<MemorySegment>, TrackedLease<MemorySegment>, com.teragrep.stb_01.Stubable, AutoCloseable
public final class TrackedMemorySegmentLease extends Object implements TrackedLease<MemorySegment>

      public boolean hasZeroRefs()
      Specified by:
      hasZeroRefs in interface Lease<MemorySegment>
      Returns:
      status of the lease, true indicates that the lease has expired.

    • sliceAt

      public TrackedLease<MemorySegment> sliceAt(long offset)
      Description copied from interface: Lease
      Provides a slice from the offset to the end of the segment. Registered as a sub lease.
      Specified by:
      sliceAt in interface Lease<MemorySegment>
      Parameters:
      offset - start offset
      Returns:
      slice of the lease, registered as a sublease.
